title: Backup & Restore
subtitle: Full application backup: database, reports, branding, and configuration.
deleteConfirm: Delete this backup? This action cannot be undone.
restoreHint: Upload a backup archive (.zip) to restore. A safety backup of the current state is created automatically before restoring. The application will restart after restore.
confirmRestoreHint: Current data will be replaced with the backup. A safety backup is created automatically first.
restoreSuccess: Restore initiated. The application will restart shortly.
haBackupInfo: The Home Assistant backup includes the /data directory, which contains the database, reports, branding, and configuration. SMTP passwords must be re-entered after reinstalling the add-on.
whatIsIncluded: What does the app backup include?
includedItems: Database, generated reports, branding assets (logo), configuration
notIncluded: SMTP password is stored in the database — verify by sending a test email after restore.
smtpPasswordCheck: Check SMTP password after restore — confirm settings and send a test email.
